title: pilosella subdecolorans
intro: Pilosella subdecolorans, also known as yellow salsify or oxeye daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Pilosella subdecolorans include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, or used topically as a poultice or salve to aid in wound healing.
